target: 5. Memories of Kofune

I'm back!
Sorry I'm late!

I'm back!
I'm back again!

Welcome back, you're hungry, right?
Lunch is ready.

That's right!
Let's put the time capsule search on hold for now,
and get something to eat first.

You're right.
Welcome back, Alan.

Welcome back, Shinpei.
You're probably up to something again.
Yeah, you could say that.

Dad, add another plate!
For our customer's meal.

Hey, Kaori!
Come over here.

H-hello.
I'm sorry to bother you during such a busy time.

Ah, welcome.
Chao, is this your high school friend?

No, no.
She was my classmate in elementary school,
Kaori Koyumiba.

She moved away from the island after elementary school,
but came back for the festival.

Ah, so this is the Koyumiba family's child!
You've grown up so nicely.
Are your parents okay?
Yes, thank you.
That's good.

Kaori-chan,
she's an idol in Tokyo now,
and she's really popular.

So the town hall and the chamber of commerce invited her
as a special guest for the festival
because she wants to bring people in with her popularity.

Oh, really?
Then you should eat properly.
Will you have lunch with everyone?
Ah, about the money--

No need to worry.
It's a thank you for getting along with my kids.

Never mind that, just sit down.
Would you like to sit next to Shinpei?
Please, Koyumiba-san.

Y-yes.
I'll take you up on your offer.
Thank you all so much.
Then…
Let's eat!

Kaori-chan, how is it?
My dad's fried food is amazing.
…Mmm, delicious!
See?

This taste… I remember it.
I've had this before!

Ah, sometimes the family would come
to eat here.

Yes, that's right.
I think that's how it was.
I was too young to remember clearly…
Hehe, it's so nostalgic.
We found a memory already!

Yes!
Thank you, Kofune-san.
Ugh~~~, it's so hot, so hot!!
Welcome, Totsumura.

Oh! 
Everyone's having lunch together?
You came for lunch too, Totsumura-san?
Yes, and as part of a patrol.

With the festival coming up, tourists are increasing,
so I'm doing a little warning…

Wahhh!! 
Oh, Kaori Koyumiba-chan!?

Y-you're kidding me!?
Why are you here…!

Hello~!
This is Kaori Koyumiba!
Totsumura, you know Kaori-chan?

Of course I do, she's a fan!
I was looking forward to her coming
for the festival!
Thank you!
Kaori-chan, you're a completely different person.

That's right.
It's the adult sales smile.

Ah, um!
Can I get an autograph too!?

Totsumura-san!
Kaori-chan is having lunch now,
so let's do it later!

Well, that's unavoidable…
I'll do it after Kaori-chan eats…

No, it's okay!
I'll write it right away,
so please wait a little.

H-honestly!?
You really mean it!?
Yes, of course.

I'm so grateful!
I'll treasure it as a family heirloom!

(Kaori-san is so kind…
She didn't even make a sour face)
